description: Unified Communications & Notifications — In-app notifications (Phase 1+1.5 done), staff invite emails (Phase 2 in progress), email extension (Phase 3), FCM push (Phase 4), broadcasts + messaging + Ditto AI (Phase 5+).
notes: Merged from notifications_mvp_20260217 + messaging_service_20251229. Key open questions documented in plan.md regarding admin escalation, feedback system, staff comms, data export, and notification storage lifecycle.
